# tmp_product_variations

Generic temporary variation rows for source listings that are variations of a stable product.

## Columns

| Column | Type | Required | Key | Default | Relation | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `bigint` | yes | PK |  |  | Internal product variation row identifier. | `1001` |
| `product_id` | `bigint` | yes | FK |  | `tmp_products.id` (on delete cascade) | Generic temporary product row this variation belongs to. | `1000` |
| `source_key` | `text` | yes |  |  |  | Stable variation key from the scraper source. Grimsmo uses the listing handle. | `saga-1234-5678` |
| `created_at` | `timestamp with time zone` | yes |  | `now()` |  | Timestamp when the variation row was created. | `2026-07-17T20:45:00.000Z` |
| `updated_at` | `timestamp with time zone` | yes |  | `now()` |  | Timestamp when the variation row was last updated. | `2026-07-17T20:45:42.000Z` |

## Indexes

| Name | Unique | Method | Columns |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `tmp_product_variations_id_product_id_unique` | yes | `btree` | `id`, `product_id` |
| `tmp_product_variations_product_id_idx` | no | `btree` | `product_id` |
| `tmp_product_variations_product_source_key_unique` | yes | `btree` | `product_id`, `source_key` |
